name: Peacekeeper
description: Notes This mace summons three Royal Guards instead of a single minion, instantly taking up all 3 of a player’s summon slots on use. Each Royal Guard has its own movement patterns, attacks, and behaviors.
effects: Archer’s Bow: 500-600 damage Raider’s Spear: 100-150 damage Knight’s Slash: 100-250 damage Knight’s Flurry: 100-200 damage
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
